response.body_raw: {"choices":[{"finish_reason":"stop","index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"Leaves are green because they contain chlorophyll, a pigment that absorbs light most efficiently in the blue and red parts of the light spectrum, but less efficiently in the green part, which is why the reflected light appears green to our eyes."}}],"created":1784574777,"model":"/Users/bbadmin/.ollama/models/blobs/sha256-44d19d212d76a6f3fc442e8411fdb44ea6b67ceccfb00be4b4345c9a4cf813e8","system_fingerprint":"b10050-b15ca938a","object":"chat.completion","usage":{"completion_tokens":55,"prompt_tokens":247,"total_tokens":302,"prompt_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":133}},"id":"chatcmpl-3TBycwgFuA8NdV8n7XecaBcnkX5eNrbZ","timings":{"cache_n":133,"prompt_n":114,"prompt_ms":177.904,"prompt_per_token_ms":1.5605614035087718,"prompt_per_second":640.7950355247774,"predicted_n":55,"predicted_ms":686.51,"predicted_per_token_ms":12.482,"predicted_per_second":80.11536612722321}}
